headline: Is Datadog, Inc. (DDOG) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is DDOG a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Datadog, Inc. on Hunterbrook’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on DDOG. Datadog, Inc.’s share was trading at $146.69 as of May 4th. DDOG’s trailing and forward P/E were 453.32 and 65.79 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. Datadog, Inc. […]
